results.rendered_html:
anu-√mud to join in rejoicing,  RV. viii, 1, 14 , &c.;
to sympathize with, to rejoice;
to allow with pleasure, express approval, applaud, permit:
Caus. -modayati, to express approval, permit.

results.rendered_html:
anumud 1 A. (P. in epic poetry)
1 To rejoice with, join in rejoicing or sympathizing with; muditāmanumodate  Bhāg. 
2 To express approval; tadeva rāmamātṛbhiranumoditaṃ  U. 2 ; approve, second, applaud; niṣeddhumāsīdanumodituṃ vā  R. 14. 43 ; to allow with pleasure, permit; anumoditamācāryaiḥ  K. 77 ; ananumoditāmātrā 160. 
— Caus. To gladden, delight, favour, permit.
